focus: quitting the current job to move to Japan and whether the girlfriend will relocate together
cardReadingDirection: Yes — quit the job and make the move to Japan, and yes, the girlfriend is very likely to come with you: all five cards are upright and every one signals supported forward motion. Card 1 (The Fool) = the user has permission to take the leap into Japan even without every detail locked down; treat the move as a fresh chapter to walk into with curiosity rather than waiting for perfect certainty. Card 2 (Ten of Wands) = the current job cycle is complete and the user has been carrying its full weight to the end; resigning is putting down a finished load, not abandoning something, so hand off responsibilities cleanly and leave without guilt. Card 3 (The Star) = the relationship survives the transition; the girlfriend's hope for a shared future is genuine, so frame the move to her as healing and renewal for both of you, not as your solo escape. Card 4 (King of Cups) = she will say yes if she feels emotional safety and a responsible plan, so lead that conversation calmly with concrete answers about housing, her work options, and finances instead of just enthusiasm. Card 5 (Six of Swords) = this is literally the card of traveling to calmer shores with support in the boat — the relocation goes smoothly and you do not travel alone. Start this week: set a target departure date, research Japan work visa requirements and job openings in your field, and sit down with your girlfriend to build a joint relocation plan (timeline, budget, her career path there) so the decision becomes ours instead of mine.
